GEORGE R. MORRIS 
Las Vegas, NV | 702-530-4335 | george@georgethegeek.com 
Portfolio: georgethegeek.com | Projects: SupportWow.com 
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY 
Dedicated Systems Administrator and Technical Lead with a "force multiplier" approach to 
infrastructure management. Expert in L2/L3 support escalations, KVM virtualization, and server 
health monitoring. Proven track record in the hosting industry—including tenure at major 
providers like HostGator and Arvixe—transitioning complex technical issues into documented, 
repeatable solutions. Currently architecting automated client portals and support systems to 
streamline hosting operations. 
TECHNICAL CORE COMPETENCIES 
●​Virtualization & Cloud: KVM, Proxmox, VPS Deployment, OS Template Optimization. 
●​Server Administration: Linux (Ubuntu, Debian, CentOS), Windows Server (2016-2022). 
●​Hosting Control Panels: HestiaCP, Coolify, DirectAdmin, cPanel/WHM. 
●​Hardware & Networking: Server Hardware Triage, Component Replacement, 
Monitoring (Checkmk, Nagios). 
●​Web & Automation: PHP, Webflow, Relume, API Integrations, Custom Ticket Systems. 
●​Support Operations: Help Desk Management (L2/L3), SLA Compliance, Technical 
Documentation. 
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE 
KINGS GLOBAL CONSULTING | Remote 
IT Systems Administrator / L3 Support | October 2024 – February 2026 
●​Managed performance and stability for diverse server infrastructure, ensuring 99.9% 
uptime for client web assets. 
●​Acted as the primary escalation point for L2 support staff, resolving complex OS-level 
conflicts and network bottlenecks. 
●​Performed routine server health monitoring and triaged hardware replacement requests 
for dedicated server environments. 
●​Documented recurring infrastructure issues and implemented permanent resolutions to 
reduce ticket volume by 15%. 
GEORGETHEGEEK.COM (Independent Projects) | Las Vegas, NV 
Infrastructure Architect | February 2024 – Present 
●​Engineered SupportWow.com, a specialized support ticket system designed to 
integrate seamlessly with hosting service offerings. 
●​Configure and maintain private KVM-based virtualization environments for testing and 
deploying production-ready web applications. 
●​Architected automated deployment pipelines for containerized applications, reducing

manual configuration time for new client environments. 
PRIOR HOSTING EXPERIENCE (HOSTGATOR & ARVIXE) 
Technical Support Specialist / Server Admin 
●​Provided high-tier technical support for shared, VPS, and dedicated hosting 
environments within high-volume ticket and phone queues. 
●​Identified and resolved server-side issues including resource contention, mail delivery 
failures, and security breaches. 
●​Gained foundational experience in large-scale data center operations and standardized 
hosting support protocols. 
PEKIN PC SOLUTIONS | Pekin, IL 
Lead Technical Consultant | 2015 – 2023 
●​Provided high-level technical support and infrastructure consulting for small-to-medium 
businesses. 
●​Managed full-cycle server deployments, including hardware selection, OS installation 
(Linux/Windows), and security hardening. 
●​Maintained an excellent track record of customer satisfaction by providing responsive, 
clear communication during critical outages and migrations. 
EDUCATION & PROFESSIONAL FOCUS 
●​Specialization: High-Performance Hosting Architecture and Automated Support 
Workflows. 
●​Continuing Education: Deep focus on KVM optimization, Proxmox clustering, and 
AI-driven server monitoring.
